== Notes for [[Item:Q109635|Q109635]] ==

54. ALWI-UBAIDILLAH-12.
died in Hadramaut, Yamen.
Reference Link: http://freepages.family.rootsweb.ancestry.com/~naqobatulasyrof/main/des/d12.htm#i14
Reference Link: http://familytreemaker.genealogy.com/users/a/s/y/Naqobatul-Asyrof-Jakarta/WEBSITE-0001/UHP-0014.html

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
